dashboard.subtitle: Company-wide KPIs across every order in the CRM

kpi.unpaidCommissionSub: Owed to agents across all pending orders
kpi.unpaidPayoutSub: Amount Coliix still owes us on delivered orders
kpi.pendingReturnsSub: Returned / attempted / lost — awaiting physical check

login.subtitle: Sign in to Anaqatoki
login.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Browse, assign, and manage orders across all sources.
orders.searchPlaceholder: Search by reference, name, phone, city, tracking…
orders.confirmArchiveOne: Archive order {{reference}}? This can be undone.
orders.confirmArchiveMany: Archive {{count}} orders? This can be undone.
orders.duplicatesBannerSub: Review and merge to keep KPIs clean — merged orders count as one.
orders.onlyConfirmedCanSend: Only confirmed orders can be sent
orders.stockShortTooltip: One of the variants on this order is short — confirming will fail until restocked.
orders.notTrackedTooltip: A product in this order was deleted from the catalog — stock is no longer tracked.
orders.untrackedUnitTooltip: Contains an unlinked or deleted product — stock untracked
orders.unlinkedProductBadge: Not in CRM catalog — stock is not tracked
orders.deletedProductBadge: Product was deleted from catalog — import it again to track stock

quickImport.idle: Import "{{productName}}" into the catalog and auto-link this order

create.noMatchingClient: No matching client — a new one will be created.
create.noActiveProducts: No active products. Create a product first before adding manual orders.
create.failedToLoad: Failed to load products or cities

edit.title: Edit Order
edit.lockedBody: The parcel is packed and labeled. Order details and status can no longer be edited.

agentPicker.splitHintMixed: {{unassigned}} unassigned will be assigned. {{alreadyAssigned}} are already assigned — you'll pick which to reassign on the next step.
agentPicker.splitHintAllAssigned: All {{count}} selected orders are already assigned — you'll confirm reassignment on the next step.
agentPicker.reassignUnassignedLine_one: {{count}} unassigned order will be assigned to {{agent}}.
agentPicker.reassignUnassignedLine_other: {{count}} unassigned orders will be assigned to {{agent}}.
agentPicker.reassignTickHint: The following {{count}} already have an agent. Tick the ones you really want to reassign.

merge.title: Duplicate Orders
merge.noDuplicatesHint: Orders sharing a phone number will appear here when at least two are pending.
merge.intro: Select the keeper (radio) and check which orders to merge into it. KPIs will count the keeper as a single order after merging.
merge.askReassignFirst: Ask admin to reassign all orders to the same agent before merging.
merge.combiningHint_one: Combining {{count}} order into keeper · items will be summed · merged orders archived.
merge.combiningHint_other: Combining {{count}} orders into keeper · items will be summed · merged orders archived.

callCenter.title: Call Center
callCenter.subtitle: Manage your assigned orders — confirm, cancel, and follow up.
callCenter.noOrdersAssigned: No orders assigned to you yet
callCenter.newOrdersAppear: New orders will appear here in real time.
callCenter.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, city, reference, or tracking…
callCenter.noShippingYet: No orders exported to Coliix yet. Confirmed orders will appear here once their shipping label is sent.

row.stockShortHint: Confirming will fail — restock or pick "No stock".
row.stockShortTooltip: One of the variants on this order is short — confirming will fail until restocked.
row.unlinkedTooltip: Contains an unlinked product — stock untracked
row.deletedProductTooltip: Product was deleted from catalog — stock is not tracked. Ask an admin to import it again.
row.unlinkedProductTooltip: Not in CRM catalog — stock is not tracked. Ask an admin to import this product.

modal.stockShortBody: One of the variants is below the requested quantity — confirming will fail. Restock first, or pick No stock from the status menu.
modal.name: Name *
modal.cityNotInColiix: City not in Coliix list — fix before confirming.
modal.invalidMoroccanMobile: Invalid Moroccan mobile — expected 10 digits starting with 05 / 06 / 07.
modal.confirmationNotePlaceholder: Call context, cancellation reason, anything relevant…
modal.deliveryNotePlaceholder: Delivery instructions, address details, preferred time…
modal.orderShippedLocked: Order is shipped — confirmation actions are locked.
modal.atLeastOneProduct: Order must contain at least one product

reasons.phoneInvalid: Customer phone is not a valid Moroccan mobile.
reasons.atLeastOneProduct: Order must contain at least one product.
reasons.variantRequired: Every product must have a selected variant.
reasons.cityRequired: Customer city is required to confirm.
reasons.addressRequired: Customer address is required to confirm.
reasons.cityNotInShipping: Customer city is not in the shipping list.
reasons.writeCancelReason: Write the cancellation reason in the note field below.

duplicates.title: Duplicate orders detected
duplicates.intro_one: This client has {{count}} other unshipped order from the last 3 days. Merge them into {{reference}} so the confirmed one keeps the full amount and the rest are counted as merged.
duplicates.intro_other: This client has {{count}} other unshipped orders from the last 3 days. Merge them into {{reference}} so the confirmed one keeps the full amount and the rest are counted as merged.
duplicates.mergedNote: Merged orders stay in the system counted as "merged" (not re-confirmed). The keeper wins the confirmation.

list.title: Products
list.subtitle: Catalog & variant management
list.emptyCta: Create your first product to get started.
list.deleteFailed: Failed to delete product. Try again.

stockMatrix.title: Stock Matrix
stockMatrix.subtitle: Per-product variant grid. Click any cell to edit — updates broadcast live.

card.deleteConfirm:
Delete "{{name}}"?

The product will disappear from the catalog. Orders that already reference it stay intact (their confirmation status is preserved), but they'll show a red "untracked" marker because stock for this product is no longer maintained.

This cannot be undone.

fields.name: Product name
fields.defaultAgentHint: · used when auto-assign is set to "By Product"

variants.title: Variants
variants.subtitle: Add options and generate combinations automatically.
variants.emptyHintBefore: Add one or both option lists above, then click

measurements.title: Measurements chart
measurements.description: Add a small size chart agents can share with clients (chest, waist, length…).

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Browse, segment, and review the history of every customer.
clients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or city...

agents.title: Team members
agents.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or role...
agents.empty: No team members match the current filters.

confirm.deactivate: Deactivating will unassign their pending orders and block login. Continue?

agentCard.payoutConfirm: Pay out {{amount}} MAD to {{name}}? This marks all unpaid commissions as paid.

agentForm.passwordHint: Agent uses this to log in.

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.subtitle: Control what each role can see and do across the platform.

rolePermissionCard.adminMustKeep: The admin role must retain at least one permission.

roleForm.title: New role
roleForm.label: Display name
roleForm.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.
roleForm.permissionsHint: You'll pick permissions on the next screen after the role is created.

assignment.title: Assignment rules
assignment.subtitle: Configure how incoming orders are distributed among your confirmation agents.

master.title: Auto-assignment
master.subtitle: When disabled, new orders stay unassigned until a supervisor picks an agent.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.subtitle: How to decide who gets the next order.
strategy.roundRobinHelp: Each agent gets the configured number of orders in turn.
strategy.byProductHelp: Falls back to round-robin until product → agent mapping is configured.

bounce.title: Bounce count
bounce.subtitle: How many orders each agent receives before the rotation moves on.

simulator.title: Preview rotation
simulator.subtitle: Dry-run the current rule against the list of eligible agents. Nothing is saved.
simulator.empty: No eligible agents to rotate through.

commission.title: Commission rates
commission.subtitle: Per-agent MAD earned on each confirmed and each delivered order. Commission is paid out once per order when it delivers.

commissionTable.empty: No eligible agents yet. Create an agent first, then set their commission rates here.

expenses.label: Expenses
expenses.hint: Operational costs — invoices, utilities, ad spend

commission.emptyAgents: No agents with commission access yet.

history.reverseConfirm: Reverse this payment? Affected orders will go back to pending.

recordModal.title: Record payment · {{name}}
recordModal.notePlaceholder: e.g. Paid by bank transfer on 2026-04-18

returns.title: Return Verification
returns.subtitle: Physically check orders the carrier bounced back. Restock saleable items.
returns.searchPlaceholder: Search phone, name, city, reference, or tracking ID…

verify.title: Verify {{reference}}
verify.itemCount_one: {{count}} item — match each against the parcel
verify.itemCount_other: {{count}} items — match each against the parcel
verify.notePlaceholder: Any detail worth keeping on the record

scanner.title: Scan return
scanner.cameraHint: Align the package's QR or barcode inside the frame. Scanning stops automatically on match.
scanner.cameraErrorFallback: {{message}}. You can type the tracking ID manually instead.
scanner.cameraErrorGeneric: Could not access the camera. You can type the tracking ID manually instead.

pair.title: Pair your phone
pair.subtitle: Scan this QR with your phone camera. Sign in with the same account and start scanning parcels — each scan opens here automatically.
pair.tip: Tip: keep this tab open on the laptop — scans from the phone will pop the verify drawer right here.

phone.title: Phone scan — Returns
phone.cameraErrorGeneric: Could not access the camera. Switch to manual entry below.
phone.bottomHint: Point the camera at each parcel barcode. The order will open on your laptop automatically — verify it there, then scan the next one.

page.title: Automation
page.subtitle: WhatsApp overview, inbox, rules, templates, agent sessions, and delivery logs.

inbox.searchPlaceholder: Search or start a new chat

welcome.title: CRM WhatsApp Inbox
welcome.body: Select a conversation on the left to read the thread, send media, or record a voice note.

inbox.optedOutBanner: This customer opted out of WhatsApp. Replies are blocked.
inbox.composerPressSend: Press send to deliver this file
inbox.noMessages: No messages in this conversation yet.

browser.cantPlayVideo: Your browser can't play this video.
browser.cantPlayAudio: Your browser can't play this audio.

rules.intro: Rules decide whether a trigger actually fires. Each rule points at a template and carries optional conditions. When multiple rules match the same trigger, the highest-priority rule wins (unless you set <1>Fire every matching rule</1>).
rules.noRules: No rules — trigger will not fire.

overlap.first: Fire only the first match (by priority)

rules.forceSystem: Force sending through the system session
rules.noAnd: No AND conditions — rule matches everything here.

sessions.systemSubtitle: Used for commission DMs and as a fallback when an agent is offline.
sessions.systemMissing: A system session was configured but no matching session exists. Commission messages will fail until you create one.

qr.instructions: Open WhatsApp → Linked Devices → Link a device, then scan this code.
